corrections.correct: (18) καὶ οὐκ ἔστιν ἀντάλλαγμα πεπαιδευμένης ψυχῆς·
corrections.note: Second parenthesized line number is not printed in the body text.

corrections.current: (20) (20)καὶ οὐκ ἔστιν σταθμὸς τῆς ἀξίος ἐγκρατοῦς ψυχῆς·
corrections.correct: (20) καὶ οὐκ ἔστιν σταθμὸς τῆς ἄξιος ἐγκρατοῦς ψυχῆς·
corrections.note: Extra parenthesized line number captured before the text.
Printed accent on ἄξιος is visible.

corrections.current: καὶ κάλλος προσώπου ἐπὶ ἡλικίᾳ στασίμῃ·
corrections.correct: καὶ κάλλος προσώπου ἐπὶ ἡλικίᾳ στασίμῃ·
corrections.note: The page reads ἡλικίᾳ with acute on final alpha; transcription already has this, no change needed.

corrections.current: καὶ πόδες ὡραῖοι ἐπὶ στήθους εὐσταθοῦς.
corrections.correct: καὶ πόδες ὡραῖοι ἐπὶ στέρνοις εὐσταθοῦς.
corrections.note: Printed text reads στέρνοις, not στήθους.
Apparatus prints the lemma with accent and the witnesses as B bA; transcript has an extra a.
Rough breathing is visible in the apparatus lemma.
Circumflex is printed on final syllable.

uncertain.note: The exact witness sequence after συγκαλύψει is somewhat cramped; appears to read B bA, not B ab A.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but duplicate parenthesized line numbers were captured on lines 18 and 20, and στέρνοις was misread as στήθους. Apparatus generally matches; one witness string is cramped.
